pi_items.source: Direct SQL query COUNT(*) FROM Customer in Chinook SQLite database: github.com/lerocha/chinook-database
Data analysis of Chinook database customer spending. Verified that customers with TotalSpent >= 45.0 are correctly classified as Gold (5 customers with spending: 49.62, 47.62, 46.62, 45.62, 45.62)

Data analysis of Chinook database customer spending. Verified that customers with 40.0 <= TotalSpent < 45.0 are correctly classified as Silver (9 customers with spending: 43.62, 42.62, 41.62, 40.62 x3)
Task description specifies output location as /home/ga/Documents/CLV_Report.ods. Verified in task.json and setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook sample database contains exactly 59 customers with spending values ranging from $36.64 (minimum) to $49.62 (maximum). Segmentation thresholds are: Gold tier starts at $45.00 (5 customers qualify), Silver tier starts at $40.00 and ends below $45.00 (9 customers qualify), and Bronze tier is below $40.00 (45 customers qualify). The database is synthetic but realistic test data from the official Chinook sample database (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database), designed for educational and testing purposes.
